introtext: On this website you can find APK's for apps I made by myself, which you can install on your phone. You'll download a folder with the app-file and an information-file with info about installing the app.
selectapp: Select the app you would like to download:
text01: When you open Widget, you can type text you would like to view on your home screen and this text will appear on a widget. There are many styles and colors to choose from and more will be added!
text02: Click on the button below to download and install Widget on your phone or other compatible Android device. You may have to change the security settings on your device to complete the installation.
text03: If the app is already installed, you can also use this button to download a newer version if available.
demoinfotext: This is a snapshot from version 1.0 of Widget. Actual appearance may vary depending on app version, device, Android version, or region.
